zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Longland於大約1287年出生在英國薩默塞特阿生頓時，他的父親Nicholas de Longland20歲，母親de Longland9歲。他於大約1323年與Margaret de Furneaux在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1357年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Longland于大约1287年出生在英国薩默塞特阿生頓时，他的父亲Nicholas de Longland20岁，母亲de Longland9岁。他于大约1323年与Margaret de Furneaux在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1357年在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of the many minor places in England called Longland(s) or Langland(s). There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname   Langlands  .

variants.name: Langland
meanings: English: topographic name from Old English lang, long ‘long’ + land ‘land’, ‘territory’.
Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Langlands
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Longlands
meanings: English, Scottish: variant of Longland with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname Langlands .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Longland was born about 1287, in Ashington, Somerset, England, his father, Nicholas de Longland, was 20 and his mother, de Longland, was 9. He married Margaret de Furneaux about 1323, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1357, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Longland est né environ 1287, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Longland, avait 20 ans et sa mère, de Longland, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Furneaux environ 1323, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1357, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Longland um 1287 in Ashington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Longland 20 und seine Mutter de Longland 9. Er hat um 1323 in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Furneaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1357 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longland è nato il circa 1287 nel Ashington, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Nicholas de Longland, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, de Longland, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Furneaux circa 1323, nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1357, nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longlandが約1287年にイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Longlandは20歳，母de Longlandは9歳であった。約1323年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンでMargaret de Furneauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1357年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longland(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Longland(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 de Longland(은)는 9세였다. 그는 대략 1323년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 Margaret de Furneaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longland nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Longland, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, de Longland, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Furneaux aproximadamente 1323, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1357, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Longland родился около 1287 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Longland было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали de Longland, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Furneaux около 1323 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1357 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
